MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. CRAIG HARING, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Blank Rome LLP (tel: 424-239-3400) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JESSE FRANKLIN-MURDOCK, Esq. of Dhillon Law Group Inc. (tel: 415-433-1700) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS BRADDOCK ROAD, LLC, SEAL HARBOR PARTNERS, LLC, FIRENZE GROUP, LLC, DAVID PERLSTEIN, and SUNG MOON's MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. Counsel Jesse Franklin-Murdock requests a date for Defendants to file a responsive pleading. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified to include a deadline for a responsive pleading:

Granted in part. The portions of the second cause of action in the second amended complaint seeking specific performance and injunctive relief are stricken. The portions of the first and sixth causes of action in the second amended complaint seeking specific performance and injunctive relief are not stricken. Plaintiff concedes that it may not seek specific performance and injunctive relief on its second cause of action. At this stage of the case, and assuming the allegations of the second amended complaint are true as is required on a pleading motion, it cannot be determined as a matter of law that the plaintiff is not entitled to specific performance or injunctive relief on its first and sixth causes of action.

Defendants are to file an answer or a cross-complaint by February 3, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GOOD HOPE URBANITE PREMIUM LINKED FUND, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant David J. Perlstein To Respond To Plaintiff'S Set One Special Interrogatories (Financial Condition Discovery).

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel GRANTED in part. The Court has already authorized financial condition discovery. The Chicago address was listed in the Order Granting Attorney's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel.
